flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mid Michigan College fell 58% between 2006 and 2009 (7.6% → 3.2%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mid Michigan College rose 42% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.6k → $10.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mid Michigan College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mid Michigan College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).
